series_metadata.series_description: contains all complaints received in NEDO on air pollution, open burning, fugitive dust, ash fallout, odor, and air contamina- tion.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Continually maintain and update microfilm in operating area ; Paper: Retain six years in operating area, destroy data deemed not useful, microfilm data that is deemed useful and destroy hardcopy after microfilm has been checked for quality and completeness, Microform: Permanent ; Paper: Wastepaper
